items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical CISA Warns of Cisco Unified CM Vulnerability Exploited in Attacks CVE-2
id: 1652c55b-4c48-5727-9384-c57acd34090b
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-20230 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-20230
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/27
modified: 2026/06/27
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-20230 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-27T03:24:12Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-20230", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-20230 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1838972; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-27, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: Intelligence confirmed: Item is listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities; CVSS score 8.6 (High); EPSS score 34.160 (very high exploitation probability)

confidence_factors.signal: Item is listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities

items.recommended_sla_action: EMERGENCY PATCH — Active exploitation confirmed or KEV listed
items.apex_ai_summary: [P2] CVE / Vulnerability - moderate severity (Risk 6.0/10). EPSS 34.16% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: Valid Accounts, Exploit Public-Facing Application, Exploitation of Remote Services (3 techniques). Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-RAN. AI confidence: LOW (31%) - limited source data available.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical Security Vulnerability -- Actively Exploited CVE-2026-12937
id: d6262399-551b-5c78-b03e-7ccbd5d99221
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-12937 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: KEV_EXPLOIT
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12937
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/27
modified: 2026/06/27
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-12937 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-27T03:24:12Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-12937", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-12937 Exploitation Attempt - KEV_EXPLOIT"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:7710395; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-27, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: Intelligence confirmed: Item is listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities; Active exploitation language detected in intelligence text; CVSS score 7.5 (High)

confidence_factors.signal: Item is listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities
